prompt: Generate the 2nd and 3rd minimalist textual poster about graphic design or typography, hanging on a wall, so that it can form a sentence with the 1st poster in the image. Feature large, overlapping text elements in a bold, flat graphic style. Adopt the clean layout and high-contrast color scheme similar to the reference poster image.
prompt_refined: Generate two new minimalist textual posters, to be displayed as a visual series with image 1. Position these new posters vertically aligned to the right of image 1, on a plain light-colored wall with a light wooden floor visible below, matching the setting of image 1. Each of the three posters (image 1 included) must feature large, overlapping text elements in a bold, flat graphic style, utilizing the high-contrast hot pink and orange text on a white background, mirroring image 1's aesthetic. The text across the three posters should collectively form a complete sentence, such as 'I AM GRAPHIC DESIGN' or 'I AM TYPOGRAPHY'. Image 1 displays 'I AM', with the subsequent posters completing the phrase, relating to graphic design or typography.
objects: Second minimalist textual poster (vertically aligned to the right of Image 1)
Third minimalist textual poster (vertically aligned below the second poster, to the right of Image 1)
Large, overlapping text 'I AM' (on original poster)
Large, overlapping text completing the phrase (on second poster)
Large, overlapping text completing the phrase (on third poster)
